group.description: Report concepts for visualizing OSGi bundle dependencies.

concept.description: Returns bundle dependency adjacency pairs (source, target) with dependency types and versions.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT source.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, source.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, target.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, target.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring ORDER BY Source, Target
